User Experience Designer

Projects

These are some of the personal/professional projects that I have worked on in my spare time.

My full-time job is user experience designer for BDI, a world-wide distribution company. I am a member of the E-Commerce team which develops B2B, B2C, and customized views for specific companies. I would be happy to share and discuss these designs with you, but I don't want them on public display.

I have permission from the following companies and organizations to share these designs.

House of Mews Rescue

R&E Tours

Maple Bay Get-A-Way

RCK Property Rentals

Serenity in Lakewood

Cleveland Rendezvous

BDIExpress

Web & WordPress Developer

After teaching music, I pursued a development path. I continue to assist organizations and local businesses by building and maintaining their websites. These are some of my ongoing projects. Some websites do coincide with a design project.

Full Resume

UX/UI Designer · BDI · Oct 2022 – Present

  • Lead Designer for E-Commerce website.
  • Implement user research interviews and create user personas
  • Create Design System, wireframes, and low-level prototype using Figma.
  • Stay up to date on industry standards with focus on mobile design.
  • Collaborate with multiple departments
  • Communicate designs and updates with stakeholders; especially CEO and President.

IT Support Technician · BDI · July 2019 – Oct 2022

  • Diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve a wide range of software, hardware, and connectivity issues.
  • Utilize Active Directory, PowerShell, Microsoft Admin Consoles, Power Automate
  • Create tools for data analysis and asset management
  • Maintain thorough and accurate records of support.

Productivity Consultant, Trainer, Solutions Analyst · Vitalyst · August 2017 – July 2019

  • Analyzed company usage and reported usage and insights to improve utilization of support services.
  • On-Site consultation for Fortune 500 companies.
  • Trained new employees on proprietary software and Microsoft applications.
  • Improve and expand knowledge of newer technologies.

Installation Technician · iFuse · July 2017 – August 2017

  • Key member of a team of contractors that performed installation of computers and peripherals.
  • 230 monitors throughout the newly upgraded Pro Football Hall of Fame Stadium.
  • Installation of work stations at Cleveland Clinic Hospitals and Akron Children’s Hospital.
  • Installation of SMART boards and Promethean boards at East Cleveland Schools.
  • Responsible for equipment deployment, from unpacking to mounting to start-up.
  • Interfaced with multiple trades and access issues in complex construction environment.
  • Team consistently completed individual installations in less time than planned.

Band Director, Music Teacher · Richmond Heights Local Schools · July 2013 – July 2017

  • Performed teaching and planning duties.
  • Trained Educators on web-based and computer-based technologies.
  • Designed and maintained music/band webpage.
  • Volunteered aiding IT director with maintenance and troubleshooting.
  • Interfaced with multiple trades and access issues in complex construction environment.

Band/Choir Director, Website Manager · Ledgemont Local Schools · August 2007 – July 2013

  • Direct bands, choir, general music grades 7-12
  • Assist 5th and 6th grade band director
  • Work with athletic director to schedule, organize, and implement yearly concerts
  • Responsible for recruitment and retention
  • Increase community awareness of music program through media coverage and community events
  • Collaborate with booster organization to plan yearly budget for the program and students
  • Work in conjunction with teachers for students with special needs
  • Marching Band Director
  • Design and implement marching band drill designs
  • Organize marching band volunteers for fall season and summer parades
  • Prepare individuals for solos and auditions
  • Research fundraising opportunities and organize through booster club.
  • Website manager for school district
  • Implement online forms for school functions
